accessDenied.title: Access Denied

insufficientPermissions.title: Insufficient Permissions
insufficientPermissions.message: You don't have the required permission:

resourceRestricted.title: Resource Restricted
resourceRestricted.message: You don't have access to the resource:

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

roleCapabilities.title: Role Capabilities
roleCapabilities.adminDescription: — Full system access including user management, system settings, and all Operator permissions.
roleCapabilities.operatorDescription: — All Viewer visibility plus trading, position, strategy, process, backtest, and AI-integration controls.
roleCapabilities.viewerDescription: — Read-only operator visibility across accounts, wallets and portfolios, signals, AI decisions, P&L, backtests, strategies, processes, and health. Cannot perform operational actions.

quickReference.title: Quick Reference
quickReference.navigation: Use the sidebar menu to navigate between sections
quickReference.darkMode: Dark mode toggle is available in the header bar
quickReference.exportData: Export data to CSV from Orders and Signals pages
